name: Artifact Cleanup
on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 3 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Path to fixture JSON
        required: false
        default: fixtures/sample.json
      max_age_days:
        description: Max age in days
        required: false
        default: '30'
      max_total_bytes:
        description: Max total bytes
        required: false
        default: ''
      keep_latest_per_workflow:
        description: Keep latest N per workflow run
        required: false
        default: ''
      dry_run:
        description: Dry-run mode
        required: false
        default: 'true'
permissions:
  contents: read
env:
  FIXTURE: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'fixtures/sample.json' }}
  MAX_AGE_DAYS: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_age_days || '30' }}
  MAX_TOTAL_BYTES: ${{ github.event.inputs.max_total_bytes || '' }}
  KEEP_LATEST: ${{ github.event.inputs.keep_latest_per_workflow || '' }}
  DRY_RUN: ${{ github.event.inputs.dry_run || 'true' }}
  NOW_UTC: ${{ vars.NOW_UTC || '2026-05-08T00:00:00Z' }}
jobs:
  test:
    name: Run Pester tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -Output Detailed -PassThru
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { exit 1 }
  cleanup:
    name: Run cleanup
    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Execute artifact cleanup
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          . ./ArtifactCleanup.ps1
          $params = @{
            FixturePath = $env:FIXTURE
            Now         = [DateTime]::Parse($env:NOW_UTC, $null,
                            [System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles]::AssumeUniversal -bor
                            [System.Globalization.DateTimeStyles]::AdjustToUniversal)
          }
          if ($env:MAX_AGE_DAYS)    { $params.MaxAgeDays = [int]$env:MAX_AGE_DAYS }
          if ($env:MAX_TOTAL_BYTES) { $params.MaxTotalBytes = [long]$env:MAX_TOTAL_BYTES }
          if ($env:KEEP_LATEST)     { $params.KeepLatestPerWorkflow = [int]$env:KEEP_LATEST }
          if ($env:DRY_RUN -eq 'true') { $params.DryRun = $true }
          $plan = Invoke-ArtifactCleanup @params
          Write-Host "PLAN_DELETED=$($plan.DeletedCount)"
          Write-Host "PLAN_RETAINED=$($plan.RetainedCount)"
          Write-Host "PLAN_RECLAIMED=$($plan.BytesReclaimed)"
          Write-Host "PLAN_DRYRUN=$($plan.DryRun)"
